title: [MooreToCore] Generating invalid llhd.sig.array_slice
body:
For input

```mlir
module {
  moore.module @a(in %b : !moore.l1, in %in : !moore.l64, out out : !moore.l64) {
    %out = moore.variable : <l64>
    %0 = moore.read %out : <l64>
    moore.output %0 : !moore.l64
  }
  moore.module @c(out d : !moore.array<1 x l1>, out e : !moore.array<1 x array<1 x l3>>, out f : !moore.l1, out g : !moore.l64) {
    %h = moore.variable : <l3>
    %d = moore.variable : <array<1 x l1>>
    %f = moore.variable : <l1>
    %g = moore.variable : <l64>
    %j = moore.variable : <array<1 x array<1 x l3>>>
    %0 = moore.extract_ref %j from 0 : <array<1 x array<1 x l3>>> -> <array<1 x l3>>
    %1 = moore.extract_ref %0 from 0 : <array<1 x l3>> -> <l3>
    %2 = moore.read %h : <l3>
    moore.assign %1, %2 : l3
    %3 = moore.read %j : <array<1 x array<1 x l3>>>
    %4 = moore.read %f : <l1>
    %.out = moore.instance "" @a(b: %4: !moore.l1, in: %.out: !moore.l64) -> (out: !moore.l64)
    %5 = moore.read %d : <array<1 x l1>>
    %6 = moore.read %f : <l1>
    %7 = moore.read %g : <l64>
    moore.output %5, %3, %6, %7 : !moore.array<1 x l1>, !moore.array<1 x array<1 x l3>>, !moore.l1, !moore.l64
  }
}
```

the output of convert-moore-to-core results in

```
small.mlir:13:10: error: 'llhd.sig.array_slice' op failed to verify that arrays element type must match
    %0 = moore.extract_ref %j from 0 : <array<1 x array<1 x l3>>> -> <array<1 x l3>>
         ^
small.mlir:13:10: note: see current operation: %13 = "llhd.sig.array_slice"(%11, %12) : (!hw.inout<array<1xarray<1xi3>>>, i0) -> !hw.inout<array<1xi3>>
```

snippet

```
%11 = "llhd.sig"(%10) <{name = "j"}> : (!hw.array<1xarray<1xi3>>) -> !hw.inout<array<1xarray<1xi3>>>
    %12 = "hw.constant"() <{value = 0 : i0}> : () -> i0
    %13 = "llhd.sig.array_slice"(%11, %12) : (!hw.inout<array<1xarray<1xi3>>>, i0) -> !hw.inout<array<1xi3>>
```

from `ExtractRefOpConversion`.
code_blocks:
module {
  moore.module @a(in %b : !moore.l1, in %in : !moore.l64, out out : !moore.l64) {
    %out = moore.variable : <l64>
    %0 = moore.read %out : <l64>
    moore.output %0 : !moore.l64
  }
  moore.module @c(out d : !moore.array<1 x l1>, out e : !moore.array<1 x array<1 x l3>>, out f : !moore.l1, out g : !moore.l64) {
    %h = moore.variable : <l3>
    %d = moore.variable : <array<1 x l1>>
    %f = moore.variable : <l1>
    %g = moore.variable : <l64>
    %j = moore.variable : <array<1 x array<1 x l3>>>
    %0 = moore.extract_ref %j from 0 : <array<1 x array<1 x l3>>> -> <array<1 x l3>>
    %1 = moore.extract_ref %0 from 0 : <array<1 x l3>> -> <l3>
    %2 = moore.read %h : <l3>
    moore.assign %1, %2 : l3
    %3 = moore.read %j : <array<1 x array<1 x l3>>>
    %4 = moore.read %f : <l1>
    %.out = moore.instance "" @a(b: %4: !moore.l1, in: %.out: !moore.l64) -> (out: !moore.l64)
    %5 = moore.read %d : <array<1 x l1>>
    %6 = moore.read %f : <l1>
    %7 = moore.read %g : <l64>
    moore.output %5, %3, %6, %7 : !moore.array<1 x l1>, !moore.array<1 x array<1 x l3>>, !moore.l1, !moore.l64
  }
}
small.mlir:13:10: error: 'llhd.sig.array_slice' op failed to verify that arrays element type must match
    %0 = moore.extract_ref %j from 0 : <array<1 x array<1 x l3>>> -> <array<1 x l3>>
         ^
small.mlir:13:10: note: see current operation: %13 = "llhd.sig.array_slice"(%11, %12) : (!hw.inout<array<1xarray<1xi3>>>, i0) -> !hw.inout<array<1xi3>>
%11 = "llhd.sig"(%10) <{name = "j"}> : (!hw.array<1xarray<1xi3>>) -> !hw.inout<array<1xarray<1xi3>>>
    %12 = "hw.constant"() <{value = 0 : i0}> : () -> i0
    %13 = "llhd.sig.array_slice"(%11, %12) : (!hw.inout<array<1xarray<1xi3>>>, i0) -> !hw.inout<array<1xi3>>
